name: genai/session
description: Session component with pluggable storage: native files (default), a project file dir (cache/session), or a database (PDO). A small Session API over native PHP sessions; a SessionStore save-handler decides where the data lives. Driver chosen from the [session] config group. PHP 5.3-safe runtime.

suggest.genai/di: Wire the Session bean (a #[Configuration] #[Bean(Session::class)] using SessionFactory).
suggest.ext-pdo: Required only for the 'database' session store.
